entries.title: as evidence that LLM-mediated text-to-geometry is viable for complex tasks.
The Reflective Practitioner: How Professionals Think in Action
entries.abstract: Foundational text on reflective practice in professional work. The CLI's OK:/ERROR: protocol operationalizes Schon's reflective conversation with the situation.

entries.title: Understanding the Blind: An Integrative Approach to Visual Impairment
entries.abstract: Comprehensive account of blind spatial cognition, sequential landmark-based reasoning, and language-mediated spatial understanding.

entries.title: Spatial representations and navigation in blind people
entries.abstract: Review of blind spatial cognition research including mental maps, wayfinding strategies, and non-visual spatial representation.

entries.title: Spatial learning and navigation in blindness
entries.abstract: Updated framework for blind spatial cognition. Key reference for the project's semantic-over-geometric approach.

entries.title: Architecture's New Media: Principles, Theories, and Methods of Computer-Aided Design
entries.abstract: Process as first-class artifact alongside product. Relevant to version-controlled, auditable design workflows.

entries.title: Digital Design and Manufacturing: CAD/CAM Applications in Architecture and Design
entries.abstract: ACADIA 2024 Teaching Award work. Fabrication-centered pedagogy, physical making as cognitive partner.

entries.title: Theory of Design in the Age of Computation
entries.abstract: Reflective practice over routine production. Framework for understanding computational design pedagogy.

entries.title: The Space Between: Architecture and Disability
entries.abstract: Beyond access: disability as architectural knowledge. Challenges accommodation-as-minimum-compliance.

entries.title: Guidelines and Standards for Tactile Graphics
entries.abstract: BANA guidelines for tactile graphic production. Standards for braille labels, line weights, density ranges used in PIAF output.

entries.title: Universal Design in Higher Education: From Principles to Practice
entries.abstract: Framework for universal design in educational settings. Background for inclusive studio pedagogy.

entries.title: Disability, Architecture, and Infrastructure
entries.abstract: Building Access: Universal Design and the Politics of Disability. Critical disability studies framework for architectural accessibility.

entries.title: Towards a Critical Technical Practice: Accessible Design in Architecture
entries.abstract: Diversity and Design: Understanding Hidden Consequences. Critical approach to inclusive design practice.

entries.title: Tactile maps for the blind: A case study in multisensory design
entries.abstract: Research on tactile map design for blind users. Methods for translating visual spatial information to tactile form.

entries.title: Haptic perception of spatial relations by blind and sighted participants
entries.abstract: Touch, Blindness, and Neuroscience. Research on haptic spatial reasoning relevant to tactile architectural models.

entries.title: Design for Architecture in the Digital Era
entries.abstract: Architecture in the Digital Age: Design and Manufacturing. Foundational text on computational design workflows.

entries.title: Model Context Protocol: Connecting AI to tools
entries.abstract: MCP protocol specification for connecting AI assistants to external tools and data sources. Used for the Layout Jig MCP server.

entries.title: Exploring Expressive Tactile Design: Tactile Graphics Beyond Utility
entries.abstract: Research on tactile graphics as expressive medium beyond purely functional representation.

entries.title: Non-Visual Access to Computing
entries.abstract: Overview of non-visual computing interfaces including screen readers, tactile displays, and auditory interfaces.
